title: Codex visual review S16 panel a1

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: executor=blue hoodie+brown hair+no beard, reviewer=green hoodie+near-black hair+beard; pixel chibi; baked English caption legible+correct ('HONEST RE-RUN - RAW SCORING', 'REVIEW · RE-RUN', 'ACCEPT', '0.78', '0.89', 'sanitizer: BYPASSED', 'json.loads ✓ clean'); keep mirrored ACCEPT-stamp pose vs the earlier REJECT slam + red→green war-room shift + clean text safezone.
payload.notes: Codex visual review returned (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of panels/S16_panel_a01.png, CLI -i path, RC=0。本面板 is_baked_duo=true。executor 蓝 hoodie 棕发无须、reviewer 绿 hoodie 黑发有须双人身份在像素风格下稳定，与 identity_refs 一致；reviewer 盖绿 ACCEPT 章的姿势与早前红 REJECT 重摔构成刻意镜像，identity_consistency=5。像素霓虹风格整体统一、同一 re-eval war-room 复用且监视器由红 diff 转绿 parse 日志，与 S14 collapse 面板形成呼应，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线沿 'HONEST RE-RUN - RAW SCORING' 标题 → exact_parse 上升条带（0.78→0.89）→ REVIEW · RE-RUN verdict 卡 → 斜向绿 ACCEPT 章流动，composition_readability=5。刻意烘焙的英文文案清晰、拼写正确、无字形损坏，baked_text_quality=5；observed_literals 与 B09 honest re-run · ACCEPT 语义一致（双端点 0.78/0.89、2048 samples · raw、sanitizer: BYPASSED、json.loads ✓ clean、DDL T-02:58 信任链完整），content_corruption_present=false。无非预期杂散字形（stray_text_present=false），无字形噪点，artifact_severity=0。已预留干净文字安全区（safezone_present=true）。与 Gemini 在 identity/style/comp/artifact 上完全一致（disagreeId=0）。正向不变量：双人身份锚定 + 绿章镜像姿势 + baked 英文信任链文案可读正确 + verdict 卡几何与 REJECT 卡镜像保持。
